title: Short title
doc_html:
PART VI. DON SCOGGINS LAW

§1300.51. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the " Don Scoggins Law".

            Acts 2023, No. 367, §1; Acts 2024, No. 666, §1.
doc_text:
PART VI.  DON SCOGGINS LAW
§1300.51.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the " Don Scoggins Law".
Acts 2023, No. 367, §1; Acts 2024, No. 666, §1.
